title: octarrhena bilabrata
intro: Octarrhena bilabrata, also known as the two-leaved Octarrhena, is a rare and endangered species of orchid found in New Guinea. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Octarrhena bilabrata include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as its use as an anti-inflammatory agent for pain relief. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in traditional remedies, where it is typically dried and made into a tea or infused into a decoction to release its medicinal properties.
